base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of bosses_koopalings — a character (boss) from 1988 super mario bros 3. 7 Koopalings — Larry (W1), Morton (W2), Wendy (W3), Iggy (W4), Roy (W5), Lemmy (W6), Ludwig (W7) — each with 3-4 attack frames (wand-shot + jump + defeat) + Bowser (W8 final). 356×1442 tall canvas. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 7 Koopalings — Larry (W1), Morton (W2), Wendy (W3), Iggy (W4), Roy (W5), Lemmy (W6), Ludwig (W7) — each with 3-4 attack frames (wand-shot + jump + defeat) + Bowser (W8 final). 356×1442 tall canvas
